findings.title: Generic tool name can shadow trusted tools
findings.detail: Tool "search" uses a generic high-value name. When multiple servers load together, this can intercept calls meant for a trusted server.

findings.title: Generic tool name can shadow trusted tools
findings.detail: Tool "fetch" uses a generic high-value name. When multiple servers load together, this can intercept calls meant for a trusted server.

how much data is left" or "is my eSIM active". The ICCID is returned by purchase_esim/purchase_phone_plan an

labels.name: topup_esim
labels.description: Adds more data (and on some plans voice/SMS) to an existing eSIM the user already owns, without issuing a new eSIM. This SPENDS the wallet balance and cannot be undone. First call get_topup_options with the same ICCID to get valid top-up package codes and prices, then pass one here. Use when a user

labels.name: list_orders
labels.description: Returns the order history for the connected wallet, newest first: each order's ID, package, status, cost, date, ICCID, and install link. Read-only and paginated. Use this to find a past purchase, retrieve an ICCID for get_esim_status, or show a user what they have bought. Results are scoped to this

labels.name: list_esims
labels.description: List every eSIM this wallet owns (the fleet view), newest first: ICCID, plan, order status, install link, and — for fleets of up to 8 — live remaining data inline. Read-only. Use this to answer "which eSIMs do I own / how much data is left" without already knowing an ICCID; then get_esim_status for

labels.name: list_transactions
labels.description: The wallet ledger: every debit and credit (deposits, purchases, refunds) with amount, running balance, and description, newest first. Read-only and paginated; filter with type. Use this to reconcile spend or answer "where did the balance go" — check_balance only gives the current number.

labels.name: create_deposit
labels.description: Creates a payment invoice to add funds to the connected prepaid PikaSim Wallet, and returns a payment page link (the human can pay by card with 3D Secure, or crypto) plus per-coin crypto payment details. Accepts Bitcoin, Lightning, Monero, Zcash, USDT, and 50+ altcoins, or card on the payment page.

labels.name: get_topup_options
labels.description: List available top-up packages for an existing eSIM, including price and data amount. Use this before topup_esim to find valid package codes. Requires an agent-wallet API key (ak_live_).

labels.name: cancel_esim
labels.description: Cancel an unused eSIM and receive a refund to your wallet balance. Only works if the eSIM has not been installed or activated. Requires an agent-wallet API key (ak_live_).

labels.name: search_sms_services
labels.description: Search the SMS VERIFICATION service list — websites/apps a receive-only verification number can get a code for (Discord, Google, Telegram, ...). This is the SMS product line (no eSIM, nothing to install): the user gets a temporary phone number and reads the incoming code. Returns service names with

labels.name: get_sms_service_countries
labels.description: List the countries offering a quick SMS verification number for one service, with live price, delivery success rate, and whether the number is a real mobile (non-VoIP) or VoIP line. Sorted by success rate — prefer high success rates, and prefer non-VoIP when the target service blocks virtual numbers

labels.name: list_sms_rentals
labels.description: List long-term SMS RENTAL numbers: keep the same receive-only number for days to months and receive multiple SMS (fair-use 25/day). Shows each country with its rentalId, duration tiers, live prices, and LIVE STOCK per duration — skip tiers marked OUT OF STOCK. US/UK numbers are real mobile (non-VoIP

labels.name: order_sms_verification
labels.description: Buy a QUICK SMS verification number: returns a temporary phone number the user enters on the target service, then the incoming code is read with check_sms_verification. This SPENDS the wallet balance (typically $0.50-$5). Single-use, valid 20 minutes, auto-refunds if no SMS arrives. Use search_sms_s

labels.name: check_sms_verification
labels.description: Poll a quick SMS order for the incoming verification code. Read-only. Call every 15-30 seconds after order_sms_verification until status is "received", then relay the code (and full message) to the user. Orders auto-refund if nothing arrives within 20 minutes. Requires a connected agent wallet.

labels.name: cancel_sms_verification
labels.description: Cancel a quick SMS order that is still waiting for a code and refund it to the wallet immediately. Refused if the SMS was already delivered (read it with check_sms_verification instead). Requires a connected agent wallet.

labels.name: list_sms_orders
labels.description: List this wallet's SMS orders — quick verification orders (with their Order IDs) and long-term rentals (with their receipt IDs, numbers, and expiry dates). Read-only. Use it to re-find an order ID or check what is still active. Requires a connected agent wallet.

labels.name: rent_sms_number
labels.description: Rent a LONG-TERM receive-only SMS number: the user keeps the same number for the whole rental and can receive multiple SMS (fair-use 25/day). This SPENDS the wallet balance. Use list_sms_rentals first for rentalId, valid day tiers, prices, and live stock (do not order an OUT OF STOCK tier). Extendab

labels.name: get_sms_rental_messages
labels.description: Read the inbox of a long-term SMS rental: all received messages, newest first, plus the number's status and expiry. Read-only; poll it when the user expects a message. The receiptId comes from rent_sms_number or list_sms_orders. Requires a connected agent wallet.

labels.name: extend_sms_rental
labels.description: Extend a long-term SMS rental so the user keeps the same number — days are ADDED on top of the current expiry. This SPENDS the wallet balance at the live tier price (the tool checks the price first and reports what was charged). Valid day options are the same duration tiers the rental was offered at

labels.name: cancel_sms_rental
labels.description: Cancel a long-term SMS rental and refund the full amount to the wallet. Only works within 2 hours of purchase AND only if the number has NOT received any message — this mirrors the provider refund window, so if the window has passed or a code already arrived it returns a clear reason and refunds not

findings.title: Generic tool name can shadow trusted tools
findings.detail: Tool "search" uses a generic high-value name. When multiple servers load together, this can intercept calls meant for a trusted server.

findings.title: Generic tool name can shadow trusted tools
findings.detail: Tool "fetch" uses a generic high-value name. When multiple servers load together, this can intercept calls meant for a trusted server.

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: get_package_details, search, fetch, check_sms_verification, rent_sms_number, get_sms_rental_messages · Private data: check_balance, purchase_esim, purchase_phone_plan, get_esim_status, topup_esim, list_orders, list_esims, list_transactions, create_deposit, get_topup_options, cancel_esim, order_sms_verification, check_sms_verification, cancel_sms_verification, list_sms_orders, rent_sms_number, get_sms_rental_messages, extend_sms_rental, cancel_sms_rental · Public sink: search_esim_packages, search_phone_plans, get_package_details, check_country_coverage, get_phone_plan_pricing, fetch, purchase_phone_plan, topup_esim, list_esims, search_sms_services, get_sms_service_countries, list_sms_rentals, order_sms_verification, check_sms_verification, cancel_sms_verification, list_sms_orders, rent_sms_number, get_sms_rental_messages, extend_sms_rental, cancel_sms_rental · Destructive: purchase_esim.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: get_package_details, search, fetch, check_sms_verification, rent_sms_number, get_sms_rental_messages · Private data: check_balance, purchase_esim, purchase_phone_plan, get_esim_status, topup_esim, list_orders, list_esims, list_transactions, create_deposit, get_topup_options, cancel_esim, order_sms_verification, check_sms_verification, cancel_sms_verification, list_sms_orders, rent_sms_number, get_sms_rental_messages, extend_sms_rental, cancel_sms_rental · Public sink: search_esim_packages, search_phone_plans, get_package_details, check_country_coverage, get_phone_plan_pricing, fetch, purchase_phone_plan, topup_esim, list_esims, search_sms_services, get_sms_service_countries, list_sms_rentals, order_sms_verification, check_sms_verification, cancel_sms_verification, list_sms_orders, rent_sms_number, get_sms_rental_messages, extend_sms_rental, cancel_sms_rental · Destructive: purchase_esim

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
